use_cases: Enforcing character limits on text inputs and textareas in forms
Providing real-time character count feedback to users
Validating text input length before form submission
Building text editors with predefined character limits
Creating input components with live progress indicators
ai_summary: A custom React hook that manages character limiting for text inputs and textareas. It tracks current value, character count, and provides a change handler that prevents input beyond the specified maxLength. Ideal for building form components with real-time character feedback and validation.
